extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jai attacked with 2.5km to go on Falls Creek, held off HAUSSLER in the sprint after earlier dropping most favorites.
tactical_patterns: HINDLEY attacked at 2.5km remaining after teammate Stora exhausted himself pacing, exploiting leadout fatigue for both tactical and physical advantage.
Sun Web controlled final climb tempo through Stora until 2.5km, classic setup for protected leader's late attack on category climb.
Continental rider Burak dropped World Tour's Power in finale, suggesting amateur Continental climbers underpriced against weak World Tour domestiques at altitude.

rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: Won with late attack after team pacing, showed better sprint finish than Haussler despite hard climb effort.
rider_signals.HAUSSLER Heinrich: positive: Only rider matching Hindley's acceleration in final 2.5km, strong climbing form for classics specialist.
rider_signals.POWER Robert: negative: Dropped from final selection group on Falls Creek despite being in contention with 2.5km remaining.
